ab_a1_q1_r.hint: Say: I notice I am feeling very tired right now

ab_a1_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am noticing that I feel very tired and am struggling to focus. Let's keep going.

ab_a2_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you so much for understanding. I really appreciate it. Let's keep going.

ab_a3_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am going to step outside or find a quiet space to reset. Let's keep going.

ab_a3_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Take slow deep breaths to calm yourself.
ab_a3_q2_r.hint: Say: I am taking slow deep breaths to calm down

ab_a3_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am taking slow and deep breaths to help myself calm down and reset. Let's keep going.

ab_a3_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. After a few minutes feel your body starting to settle.

ab_a4_q1.hint: Say: I feel ready to go back to class now

ab_a4_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. The five minutes are up. Tell yourself you are ready to go back.
ab_a4_q1_r.hint: Say: I feel ready to go back to class now

ab_a4_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I feel much better and ready to go back to class now. Let's keep going.

ab_a4_q3.say: Tell the teacher you are feeling much better now.
ab_a4_q3.hint: Say: I am feeling much better now. Thank you

ab_a4_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell the teacher you are feeling much better now.
ab_a4_q3_r.hint: Say: I am feeling much better now. Thank you

ab_a4_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am feeling so much better now. Thank you for allowing me that break. Let's keep going.

ab_a4_q4.hint: Say: I am sitting down and re-focusing on the lesson

ab_a4_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sit down and re-focus on the lesson.
ab_a4_q4_r.hint: Say: I am sitting down and re-focusing on the lesson

ab_a4_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am sitting back down and re-focusing on the lesson now. I feel good. Let's keep going.

ab_a4_q5.say: Notice how much better you can concentrate now.

ab_a4_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Notice how much better you can concentrate now.
ab_a4_q5_r.hint: Say: I can concentrate so much better now!

ab_a5_q1_r.hint: Say: I notice when I need a break my body tells me

ab_a5_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I have noticed that when I need a break my body gives me clear signals. Let's keep going.

ab_a5_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell someone the signs so they can help you recognise them.
ab_a5_q3_r.hint: Say: I am going to tell someone my signs so they can help

ab_a6_q1_r.hint: Say: I asked for a break today and it really helped

ab_a6_q4_r.hint: Say: There is no shame in asking for a break. It is smart

sb_a1_q5_r.hint: Say: I am being calm and kind but I have to say no

sb_a2_bridge.say: Staying firm if they push back.

sb_a2_q1.hint: Say: No, I am still not going to do that

sb_a2_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say come on, no one will know. Hold your ground.
sb_a2_q1_r.hint: Say: No, I am still not going to do that

sb_a2_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: No, I am still not going to do that. My answer has not changed. Let's keep going.

sb_a2_q2.say: Repeat your boundary calmly without getting upset.

sb_a2_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Repeat your boundary calmly without getting upset.
sb_a2_q2_r.hint: Say: As I said, I am not comfortable with it

sb_a2_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: As I said, I am just not comfortable with it and that is not going to change. Let's keep going.

sb_a2_q3.hint: Say: I hope you can understand and respect that

sb_a2_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them you hope they can understand and respect that.
sb_a2_q3_r.hint: Say: I hope you can understand and respect that

sb_a2_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I really hope you can understand and respect where I am coming from on this. Let's keep going.

sb_a2_q4.hint: Say: I do not need to apologise for having this boundary

sb_a2_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Do not apologise for having a boundary.
sb_a2_q4_r.hint: Say: I do not need to apologise for having this boundary

sb_a2_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I do not need to apologise for having this boundary. It is my right. Let's keep going.

sb_a2_q5.say: Stay calm if they get frustrated.
sb_a2_q5.hint: Say: I will stay calm even if they get frustrated

sb_a2_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Stay calm if they get frustrated.
sb_a2_q5_r.hint: Say: I will stay calm even if they get frustrated

sb_a2_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will stay calm even if they get frustrated with me. That is their choice. Let's keep going.

sb_a3_q1.hint: Say: I can help you in a different way if you like

sb_a3_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Offer to help them in a way you are comfortable with.
sb_a3_q1_r.hint: Say: I can help you in a different way if you like

sb_a3_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I can help you in a way I am comfortable with if you would like that instead. Let's keep going.

sb_a3_q2.hint: Say: I can explain the topic to you instead

sb_a3_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them you can explain the topic to them.
sb_a3_q2_r.hint: Say: I can explain the topic to you instead

sb_a3_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I could explain the topic to you so you can understand and answer yourself. Let's keep going.

sb_a3_q3.hint: Say: We could study together before the next test instead

sb_a3_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Or offer to study together before the next test.
sb_a3_q3_r.hint: Say: We could study together before the next test instead

sb_a3_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: We could study together before the next test if you want to actually learn it. Let's keep going.

sb_a3_q4.hint: Say: I am glad you agreed to that. This is a better option

sb_a3_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They agree to the alternative. Say you are glad.
sb_a3_q4_r.hint: Say: I am glad you agreed to that. This is a better option

sb_a3_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am glad you agreed to that. This is a much better option for both of us. Let's keep going.

sb_a3_q5.hint: Say: Studying together will actually help both of us

sb_a3_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them studying together will actually help both of you.
sb_a3_q5_r.hint: Say: Studying together will actually help both of us

sb_a4_bridge.say: Setting a boundary with a friend about personal space.

sb_a4_q1.hint: Say: I need to say something about my things

sb_a4_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. A friend keeps touching your things without asking. Address it.
sb_a4_q1_r.hint: Say: I need to say something about my things

sb_a4_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I need to say something to my friend about my personal belongings. Let's keep going.

sb_a4_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them kindly that you would prefer they ask first.
sb_a4_q2_r.hint: Say: Could you ask before touching my things please?

sb_a4_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Could you please ask me before you touch my things? I would really prefer that. Let's keep going.

sb_a4_q3.say: Explain that it is about your personal space and things.
sb_a4_q3.hint: Say: It is about my personal space and belongings

sb_a4_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Explain that it is about your personal space and things.
sb_a4_q3_r.hint: Say: It is about my personal space and belongings

sb_a4_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: It is about respecting my personal space and belongings. I hope you understand. Let's keep going.

sb_a4_q4.hint: Say: Thank you for understanding. I appreciate that

sb_a4_q4_r.hint: Say: Thank you for understanding. I appreciate that

sb_a4_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you for understanding. I really appreciate you respecting that boundary. Let's keep going.

sb_a4_q5.say: Tell them you value the friendship and just need that one thing.
sb_a4_q5.hint: Say: I value our friendship. I just need that one small thing

sb_a4_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them you value the friendship and just need that one thing.
sb_a4_q5_r.hint: Say: I value our friendship. I just need that one small thing

sb_a4_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I really value our friendship. I just need that one small thing to be respected. Let's keep going.

sb_a5_q1.hint: Say: Excuse me, could you give me a bit more space?

sb_a5_q1_r.hint: Say: Excuse me, could you give me a bit more space?

sb_a5_q2.hint: Say: No problem at all. Thank you for understanding

sb_a5_q2_r.hint: Say: No problem at all. Thank you for understanding

sb_a5_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: No problem at all! Thank you for understanding and stepping back. Let's keep going.

sb_a5_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell yourself you were right to say something.
sb_a5_q3_r.hint: Say: I was right to say something

sb_a5_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I was absolutely right to say something. That was the right decision. Let's keep going.

sb_a5_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Remind yourself it is okay to ask for personal space.
sb_a5_q4_r.hint: Say: It is okay and normal to ask for personal space

sb_a5_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: It is completely okay and normal to ask for personal space when you need it. Let's keep going.

sb_a6_q3_r.hint: Say: My feelings and comfort matter and deserve to be respected

sb_a6_q4_r.hint: Say: Encourage your friend to set their own boundaries too

sb_a7_bridge.say: Boundary around online and social media.

sb_a7_q1_r.hint: Say: Sorry, those are private. I am not comfortable sharing them

sb_a7_q2_r.hint: Say: My messages are personal and private

sb_a8_q1_r.hint: Say: I am not comfortable sharing that personal information

sb_a8_q2_r.hint: Say: No, that is private and I will not be sharing it

sb_a8_q5_r.hint: Say: I feel empowered knowing I protected myself

sb_win.say: Excellent work! Setting a boundary clearly and kindly is a really important life skill. You earned a star!

ns_a1_bridge.say: You feel overwhelmed and need some time alone.

ns_a1_q1.say: You feel crowded or overstimulated and need space. Notice it.
ns_a1_q1.hint: Say: I notice I need some space right now

ns_a1_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You feel crowded or overstimulated and need space. Notice it.
ns_a1_q1_r.hint: Say: I notice I need some space right now

ns_a1_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am noticing that I feel overwhelmed and need a little space right now. Let's keep going.

ns_a1_q2.say: Take a breath and identify why you need space.
ns_a1_q2.hint: Say: I need space because I am feeling overstimulated

ns_a1_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Take a breath and identify why you need space.
ns_a1_q2_r.hint: Say: I need space because I am feeling overstimulated

ns_a1_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I need some space because I am feeling very overstimulated right now. Let's keep going.

ns_a1_q3.say: Decide to ask for space rather than running away or shutting down.
ns_a1_q3.hint: Say: I am going to ask for space rather than shutting down

ns_a1_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Decide to ask for space rather than running away or shutting down.
ns_a1_q3_r.hint: Say: I am going to ask for space rather than shutting down

ns_a1_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am going to ask calmly for some space rather than just shutting down. Let's keep going.

ns_a1_q4.say: Think of how to ask kindly without hurting anyone.
ns_a1_q4.hint: Say: I want to ask in a kind way that doesn't hurt anyone

ns_a1_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Think of how to ask kindly without hurting anyone.
ns_a1_q4_r.hint: Say: I want to ask in a kind way that doesn't hurt anyone

ns_a1_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I want to ask in a kind way that doesn't hurt the feelings of the people around me. Let's keep going.

ns_a1_q5.say: Remind yourself that needing space is okay and healthy.
ns_a1_q5.hint: Say: Needing space is okay and normal

ns_a1_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Remind yourself that needing space is okay and healthy.
ns_a1_q5_r.hint: Say: Needing space is okay and normal

ns_a1_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Needing space is completely okay and normal. It is a healthy thing to do. Let's keep going.

ns_a2_q1.say: Approach the person and get their attention gently.
ns_a2_q1.hint: Say: Hey, can I say something to you?

ns_a2_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Approach the person and get their attention gently.
ns_a2_q1_r.hint: Say: Hey, can I say something to you?

ns_a2_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Hey, can I say something to you gently for just a moment?. Let's keep going.

ns_a2_q2.say: Tell them you need a moment to yourself.
ns_a2_q2.hint: Say: I need a little moment to myself please

ns_a2_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them you need a moment to yourself.
ns_a2_q2_r.hint: Say: I need a little moment to myself please

ns_a2_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I need a little moment to myself right now if that is okay please. Let's keep going.

ns_a2_q3.say: Tell them it is not about them — you just need to recharge.
ns_a2_q3.hint: Say: It is nothing personal — I just need to recharge

ns_a2_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them it is not about them — you just need to recharge.
ns_a2_q3_r.hint: Say: It is nothing personal — I just need to recharge

ns_a2_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: It is nothing personal at all. I just need a little time to recharge. Let's keep going.

ns_a2_q4.say: Ask them to give you about ten or fifteen minutes.
ns_a2_q4.hint: Say: Could you give me about ten minutes please?

ns_a2_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask them to give you about ten or fifteen minutes.
ns_a2_q4_r.hint: Say: Could you give me about ten minutes please?

ns_a2_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Could you give me about ten or fifteen minutes please? That would help so much. Let's keep going.

ns_a2_q5.say: Tell them you will come back when you are ready.
ns_a2_q5.hint: Say: I will come back when I am feeling ready

ns_a2_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them you will come back when you are ready.
ns_a2_q5_r.hint: Say: I will come back when I am feeling ready

ns_a2_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will come back and find you when I am feeling ready. I promise. Let's keep going.

ns_a3_q1.say: Find a quiet place to sit alone for a while.

ns_a3_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Find a quiet place to sit alone for a while.
ns_a3_q1_r.hint: Say: I am going to find a quiet place to sit

ns_a3_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am going to find a quiet place where I can sit alone for a while. Let's keep going.

ns_a3_q2.say: Take some deep breaths and let yourself relax.
ns_a3_q2.hint: Say: I am going to take some deep breaths and relax

ns_a3_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Take some deep breaths and let yourself relax.
ns_a3_q2_r.hint: Say: I am going to take some deep breaths and relax

ns_a3_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am going to take some deep breaths and let myself fully relax. Let's keep going.

ns_a3_q3.say: Do something calming — like listening to music or just sitting quietly.
ns_a3_q3.hint: Say: I will do something calming while I have this space

ns_a3_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Do something calming — like listening to music or just sitting quietly.
ns_a3_q3_r.hint: Say: I will do something calming while I have this space

ns_a3_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will do something calming like listening to music or just sitting quietly. Let's keep going.

ns_a3_q4.say: Let your mind rest without pressure.
ns_a3_q4.hint: Say: I am letting my mind rest without pressure

ns_a3_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Let your mind rest without pressure.
ns_a3_q4_r.hint: Say: I am letting my mind rest without pressure

ns_a3_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am just letting my mind rest without any pressure to think or do anything. Let's keep going.

ns_a3_q5.say: After the time, notice you feel much better.
ns_a3_q5.hint: Say: I feel so much better after having that space

ns_a3_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. After the time, notice you feel much better.
ns_a3_q5_r.hint: Say: I feel so much better after having that space

ns_a3_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I feel so much better and refreshed after having that quiet time to myself. Let's keep going.

ns_a4_q1.hint: Say: I am going back now that I feel ready

ns_a4_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Your time is up. Go back and find the person.
ns_a4_q1_r.hint: Say: I am going back now that I feel ready

ns_a4_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am going back now. I feel ready to reconnect. Let's keep going.

ns_a4_q2.say: Thank them for giving you the space you needed.

ns_a4_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Thank them for giving you the space you needed.
ns_a4_q2_r.hint: Say: Thank you for giving me the space I needed

ns_a4_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you so much for giving me the space I needed. I really appreciate it. Let's keep going.

ns_a4_q3_r.hint: Say: I feel so much better now. Thank you

ns_a4_q5.say: Express that having that space helped you be a better conversationalist.
ns_a4_q5.hint: Say: Having that space helped me show up more fully

ns_a4_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Express that having that space helped you be a better conversationalist.
ns_a4_q5_r.hint: Say: Having that space helped me show up more fully

ns_a4_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Having that space really helped me show up more fully for our conversation. Let's keep going.

ns_a5_bridge.say: Explaining your need for space to someone who doesn't understand.

ns_a5_q1.say: Someone seems hurt that you asked for space. Reassure them.
ns_a5_q1.hint: Say: I want to reassure you — it is nothing to do with you

ns_a5_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Someone seems hurt that you asked for space. Reassure them.
ns_a5_q1_r.hint: Say: I want to reassure you — it is nothing to do with you

ns_a5_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I want to reassure you completely. Asking for space is nothing to do with you. Let's keep going.

ns_a5_q2.say: Explain that sometimes you just feel overstimulated.
ns_a5_q2.hint: Say: Sometimes I just feel overstimulated and need quiet

ns_a5_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Explain that sometimes you just feel overstimulated.
ns_a5_q2_r.hint: Say: Sometimes I just feel overstimulated and need quiet

ns_a5_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Sometimes I just get overstimulated and need a little quiet time. It is not personal. Let's keep going.

ns_a5_q3.say: Tell them it is just how you are wired and it is okay.
ns_a5_q3.hint: Say: It is just how I am wired and that is okay

ns_a5_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them it is just how you are wired and it is okay.
ns_a5_q3_r.hint: Say: It is just how I am wired and that is okay

ns_a5_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: It is just how I am wired and that is absolutely okay. Most people need it. Let's keep going.

ns_a5_q4.say: Ask them to trust that you will always come back.
ns_a5_q4.hint: Say: Please trust that I will always come back

ns_a5_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask them to trust that you will always come back.
ns_a5_q4_r.hint: Say: Please trust that I will always come back

ns_a5_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Please trust that I will always come back. I just need a few minutes alone. Let's keep going.

ns_a5_q5.hint: Say: Thank you for being so understanding

ns_a5_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Thank them for being understanding.
ns_a5_q5_r.hint: Say: Thank you for being so understanding

ns_a5_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you so much for being so understanding. It means a great deal to me. Let's keep going.

ns_a6_bridge.say: Making space requests a regular healthy habit.

ns_a6_q1.say: Tell someone that asking for space is a healthy habit you have.
ns_a6_q1.hint: Say: Asking for space when I need it is a healthy habit I have

ns_a6_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell someone that asking for space is a healthy habit you have.
ns_a6_q1_r.hint: Say: Asking for space when I need it is a healthy habit I have

ns_a6_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Asking for space when I need it is a really healthy habit I have developed. Let's keep going.

ns_a6_q2.say: Say it helps you show up better for the people you care about.
ns_a6_q2.hint: Say: It helps me show up better for the people I care about

ns_a6_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Say it helps you show up better for the people you care about.
ns_a6_q2_r.hint: Say: It helps me show up better for the people I care about

ns_a6_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: It helps me show up so much better for the people I care about when I need it. Let's keep going.

ns_a6_q3.say: Encourage them to try asking for space too if they need it.
ns_a6_q3.hint: Say: You should try asking for space too if you ever need it

ns_a6_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Encourage them to try asking for space too if they need it.
ns_a6_q3_r.hint: Say: You should try asking for space too if you ever need it

ns_a6_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: You should absolutely try asking for space too if you ever feel you need it. Let's keep going.

ns_a6_q4.say: Say that relationships are healthier when people respect each other's needs.
ns_a6_q4.hint: Say: Relationships are healthier when we respect each other's needs

ns_a6_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Say that relationships are healthier when people respect each other's needs.
ns_a6_q4_r.hint: Say: Relationships are healthier when we respect each other's needs

ns_a6_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Relationships are so much healthier when people respect each other's individual needs. Let's keep going.

ns_a6_q5.say: End with a commitment to always honour your own needs.
ns_a6_q5.hint: Say: I am committed to always honouring my own needs

ns_a6_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. End with a commitment to always honour your own needs.
ns_a6_q5_r.hint: Say: I am committed to always honouring my own needs

ns_a6_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am committed to always honouring my own needs in a kind and healthy way. Let's keep going.

ns_a7_q1.say: After a hard conversation, tell the person you need a few minutes.
ns_a7_q1.hint: Say: That was a lot to process. I need a few minutes

ns_a7_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. After a hard conversation, tell the person you need a few minutes.
ns_a7_q1_r.hint: Say: That was a lot to process. I need a few minutes

ns_a7_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: That was a lot to process. I need just a few minutes to gather my thoughts. Let's keep going.

ns_a7_q2.hint: Say: Thank you for understanding. I will be back soon

ns_a7_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They understand. Thank them.
ns_a7_q2_r.hint: Say: Thank you for understanding. I will be back soon

ns_a7_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you for understanding. I will be back in just a few minutes. Let's keep going.

ns_a7_q3.say: Use the minutes to breathe and process.
ns_a7_q3.hint: Say: I am using these minutes to breathe and process

ns_a7_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Use the minutes to breathe and process.
ns_a7_q3_r.hint: Say: I am using these minutes to breathe and process

ns_a7_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am using these few minutes to breathe and quietly process what was said. Let's keep going.

ns_a7_q4.say: Return when you feel ready to continue.
ns_a7_q4.hint: Say: I am back and ready to continue the conversation

ns_a7_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Return when you feel ready to continue.
ns_a7_q4_r.hint: Say: I am back and ready to continue the conversation

ns_a7_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am back now and I feel ready to continue the conversation calmly. Let's keep going.

ns_a7_q5.say: Tell them the space helped you respond more thoughtfully.
ns_a7_q5.hint: Say: The space helped me respond much more thoughtfully

ns_a7_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them the space helped you respond more thoughtfully.
ns_a7_q5_r.hint: Say: The space helped me respond much more thoughtfully

ns_a7_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: That space really helped me come back and respond so much more thoughtfully. Let's keep going.

ns_a8_bridge.say: Final act — asking for space in a social situation.

ns_a8_q1.say: At a party you feel overstimulated. Decide to find some quiet.
ns_a8_q1.hint: Say: I am going to find a quiet spot for a few minutes

ns_a8_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. At a party you feel overstimulated. Decide to find some quiet.
ns_a8_q1_r.hint: Say: I am going to find a quiet spot for a few minutes

ns_a8_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am going to find a quiet spot for a few minutes to recharge my social battery. Let's keep going.

ns_a8_q2.say: Tell a friend where you are going so they don't worry.
ns_a8_q2.hint: Say: Just letting you know I am stepping outside for a bit

ns_a8_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell a friend where you are going so they don't worry.
ns_a8_q2_r.hint: Say: Just letting you know I am stepping outside for a bit

ns_a8_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am just going to step outside for a bit. I will be back soon, don't worry. Let's keep going.

ns_a8_q3.say: Sit quietly outside and breathe for a few minutes.
ns_a8_q3.hint: Say: I am sitting quietly outside to reset for a few minutes

ns_a8_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sit quietly outside and breathe for a few minutes.
ns_a8_q3_r.hint: Say: I am sitting quietly outside to reset for a few minutes

ns_a8_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am sitting quietly outside for a few minutes to reset and recharge. Let's keep going.

ns_a8_q4.say: After a few minutes, return and rejoin the group.
ns_a8_q4.hint: Say: I am back and feeling refreshed! Let's enjoy the party

ns_a8_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. After a few minutes, return and rejoin the group.
ns_a8_q4_r.hint: Say: I am back and feeling refreshed! Let's enjoy the party

ns_a8_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am back now and feeling refreshed! Let us all enjoy the rest of the party. Let's keep going.

ns_a8_q5.say: Tell your friend the short break helped you enjoy the party more.
ns_a8_q5.hint: Say: That short break helped me enjoy the party so much more

ns_a8_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell your friend the short break helped you enjoy the party more.
ns_a8_q5_r.hint: Say: That short break helped me enjoy the party so much more

ns_a8_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: That short break really helped me enjoy the rest of the party so much more. Let's keep going.

ns_win.say: Well done! Knowing when you need space and asking for it kindly is a sign of great self-awareness. You earned a star!

ow_a1_bridge.say: Let us practice what to do when everything feels like too much.

ow_a1_q1.say: How do you feel right now? Can you name your feeling?

ow_a1_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. How do you feel right now? Can you name your feeling?

ow_a1_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I feel really overwhelmed right now. Let's keep going.

ow_a1_q2.say: Good. Who could you tell when you feel overwhelmed?
ow_a1_q2.hint: Say: I could tell a teacher or friend

ow_a1_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Good. Who could you tell when you feel overwhelmed?
ow_a1_q2_r.hint: Say: I could tell a teacher or friend

ow_a1_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I could tell my teacher or a trusted friend. Let's keep going.

ow_a1_q3.say: What would you say to start the conversation?
ow_a1_q3.hint: Say: Excuse me, can I talk to you?

ow_a1_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What would you say to start the conversation?
ow_a1_q3_r.hint: Say: Excuse me, can I talk to you?

ow_a1_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Excuse me, can I talk to you for a moment. Let's keep going.

ow_a1_q4.say: How would you explain what is happening?
ow_a1_q4.hint: Say: I have a lot going on right now

ow_a1_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. How would you explain what is happening?
ow_a1_q4_r.hint: Say: I have a lot going on right now

ow_a1_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I have too much going on and I am struggling. Let's keep going.

ow_a1_q5.say: What kind of help could you ask for?
ow_a1_q5.hint: Say: Could I have a short break?

ow_a1_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What kind of help could you ask for?
ow_a1_q5_r.hint: Say: Could I have a short break?

ow_a1_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Could I take a short break or talk to someone. Let's keep going.

ow_a2_bridge.say: You started the conversation. Now explain more.

ow_a2_q1.say: The adult says: Tell me more. What is making you feel this way?

ow_a2_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. The adult says: Tell me more. What is making you feel this way?

ow_a2_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: My homework and the test on Friday are stressing me out. Let's keep going.

ow_a2_q2.say: They ask: Is there one thing that feels biggest right now?

ow_a2_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They ask: Is there one thing that feels biggest right now?

ow_a2_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: The test coming up feels the biggest right now. Let's keep going.

ow_a2_q3.say: They say: That sounds hard. How long have you felt this way?

ow_a2_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say: That sounds hard. How long have you felt this way?

ow_a2_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I have felt this way for a few days now. Let's keep going.

ow_a2_q4.say: They ask: Did you sleep okay last night?

ow_a2_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They ask: Did you sleep okay last night?

ow_a2_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: No I did not sleep very well last night. Let's keep going.

ow_a2_q5.say: They say: Thank you for telling me. How can I help?

ow_a2_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say: Thank you for telling me. How can I help?

ow_a2_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: A short break and somewhere quiet would really help. Let's keep going.

ow_a3_bridge.say: They are helping you make a plan.

ow_a3_q1.say: They suggest: What if we break your tasks into smaller steps?

ow_a3_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They suggest: What if we break your tasks into smaller steps?

ow_a3_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes that sounds really helpful thank you. Let's keep going.

ow_a3_q2.say: They ask: Which task should we start with?

ow_a3_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They ask: Which task should we start with?

ow_a3_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Let us start with the easiest one first. Let's keep going.

ow_a3_q3.say: They say: Good choice. How much time do you need for that?

ow_a3_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say: Good choice. How much time do you need for that?

ow_a3_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Maybe about thirty minutes for that one. Let's keep going.

ow_a3_q4.say: They ask: Do you want someone to check in with you while you work?

ow_a3_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They ask: Do you want someone to check in with you while you work?

ow_a3_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes please that would help me stay on track. Let's keep going.

ow_a3_q5.say: They say: You can do this. What will you do first?

ow_a3_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say: You can do this. What will you do first?

ow_a3_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will sit down and open my notebook first. Let's keep going.

ow_a4_bridge.say: After a short break you feel a bit better.

ow_a4_q1.say: They check in: How are you feeling now?

ow_a4_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They check in: How are you feeling now?

ow_a4_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I feel a little better now thank you. Let's keep going.

ow_a4_q2.say: They ask: Did the break help?

ow_a4_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They ask: Did the break help?

ow_a4_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes it helped me calm down a bit. Let's keep going.

ow_a4_q3.say: They say: I am glad. Is there anything else you need?

ow_a4_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say: I am glad. Is there anything else you need?

ow_a4_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I think I am okay now but I may need help later. Let's keep going.

ow_a4_q4.say: They say: Remember you can always come to me. What will you do next time?

ow_a4_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say: Remember you can always come to me. What will you do next time?

ow_a4_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Next time I will ask for help sooner. Let's keep going.

ow_a4_q5.say: They say: Great plan. Anything else before you go back?

ow_a4_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say: Great plan. Anything else before you go back?

ow_a4_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: No thank you so much for listening and helping me. Let's keep going.

ow_a5_bridge.say: Let us practice some calming strategies.

ow_a5_q1.say: When you feel overwhelmed a deep breath helps. Can you say: I will take a deep breath?
ow_a5_q1.hint: Say: I will take a deep breath

ow_a5_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. When you feel overwhelmed a deep breath helps. Can you say: I will take a deep breath?
ow_a5_q1_r.hint: Say: I will take a deep breath

ow_a5_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will take a deep breath to calm down. Let's keep going.

ow_a5_q2.say: Another strategy is counting. Can you say: I will count to ten?
ow_a5_q2.hint: Say: I will count to ten

ow_a5_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Another strategy is counting. Can you say: I will count to ten?
ow_a5_q2_r.hint: Say: I will count to ten

ow_a5_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will count slowly to ten in my head. Let's keep going.

ow_a5_q3.say: You could also write it down. Can you say: I will write down how I feel?
ow_a5_q3.hint: Say: I will write it down

ow_a5_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You could also write it down. Can you say: I will write down how I feel?
ow_a5_q3_r.hint: Say: I will write it down

ow_a5_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will write down how I feel and why. Let's keep going.

ow_a5_q4.say: Talking to a friend can also help. Can you say: I will call a friend?
ow_a5_q4.hint: Say: I will talk to a friend

ow_a5_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Talking to a friend can also help. Can you say: I will call a friend?
ow_a5_q4_r.hint: Say: I will talk to a friend

ow_a5_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will call or text a friend I trust. Let's keep going.

ow_a5_q5.say: Which strategy feels easiest for you?

ow_a5_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Which strategy feels easiest for you?

ow_a5_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I think deep breathing feels easiest for me right now. Let's keep going.

ow_a6_bridge.say: Let us practice asking a teacher for a break.

ow_a6_q1.say: You walk up to your teacher. What do you say first?

ow_a6_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You walk up to your teacher. What do you say first?

ow_a6_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Excuse me, do you have a second. Let's keep going.

ow_a6_q2.say: Teacher looks up. What do you say next?

ow_a6_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Teacher looks up. What do you say next?

ow_a6_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am feeling really overwhelmed and I need a moment. Let's keep going.

ow_a6_q3.say: Teacher says: Of course. What do you need?

ow_a6_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Teacher says: Of course. What do you need?

ow_a6_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Could I step outside for a quick break please. Let's keep going.

ow_a6_q4.say: Teacher says: Yes, five minutes. What do you say?

ow_a6_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Teacher says: Yes, five minutes. What do you say?

ow_a6_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you so much I really appreciate it. Let's keep going.

ow_a6_q5.say: After the break you return. What do you say?

ow_a6_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. After the break you return. What do you say?

ow_a6_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am back and feeling much better now thank you. Let's keep going.

ow_a7_bridge.say: Let us talk about what you can do on your own.

ow_a7_q1.say: What is something you can do alone when you feel overwhelmed?

ow_a7_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What is something you can do alone when you feel overwhelmed?

ow_a7_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I can sit somewhere quiet and breathe slowly. Let's keep going.

ow_a7_q2.say: How long should you try calming down before asking for help?

ow_a7_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. How long should you try calming down before asking for help?

ow_a7_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I should try for a few minutes first. Let's keep going.

ow_a7_q3.say: What if the calming strategy does not work?

ow_a7_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What if the calming strategy does not work?

ow_a7_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Then I should go and ask an adult for help. Let's keep going.

ow_a7_q4.say: Is it okay to ask for help when you feel overwhelmed?

ow_a7_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Is it okay to ask for help when you feel overwhelmed?

ow_a7_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes it is always okay to ask for help. Let's keep going.

ow_a7_q5.say: Who is one person you could go to at school?

ow_a7_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Who is one person you could go to at school?

ow_a7_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I would go to my counselor or homeroom teacher. Let's keep going.

ow_a8_bridge.say: Final practice: putting it all together.

ow_a8_q1.say: You feel overwhelmed in the hallway. What is your first step?

ow_a8_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You feel overwhelmed in the hallway. What is your first step?

ow_a8_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I would stop and take a slow deep breath first. Let's keep going.

ow_a8_q2.say: Now you need to tell someone. What do you say?

ow_a8_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Now you need to tell someone. What do you say?

ow_a8_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Excuse me I am feeling overwhelmed and need some help. Let's keep going.

ow_a8_q3.say: They ask what happened. What do you say?

ow_a8_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They ask what happened. What do you say?

ow_a8_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I have a lot going on and it all hit me at once. Let's keep going.

ow_a8_q4.say: They offer to help. What do you say?

ow_a8_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They offer to help. What do you say?

ow_a8_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you yes please that would mean a lot. Let's keep going.

ow_a8_q5.say: After the talk how do you feel?

ow_a8_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. After the talk how do you feel?

ow_a8_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I feel calmer and better now thank you. Let's keep going.

ow_win.say: Amazing! You told someone you were overwhelmed and asked for help. That is so brave! You earned a star!

lo_a1_bridge.say: It can hurt to feel left out. Let us practice talking about it.

lo_a1_q1.say: How do you feel when you are not included?

lo_a1_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. How do you feel when you are not included?

lo_a1_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I feel really left out and a little hurt. Let's keep going.

lo_a1_q2.say: Who do you feel left out by?

lo_a1_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Who do you feel left out by?

lo_a1_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: My friends or the group I usually sit with. Let's keep going.

lo_a1_q3.say: How do you know you were left out?

lo_a1_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. How do you know you were left out?

lo_a1_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: They made plans and did not tell me or invite me. Let's keep going.

lo_a1_q4.say: How long have you felt this way?

lo_a1_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. How long have you felt this way?

lo_a1_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: It has been happening for a few days now. Let's keep going.

lo_a1_q5.say: Is there someone you could talk to about it?

lo_a1_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Is there someone you could talk to about it?

lo_a1_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I could talk to a trusted friend or my counselor. Let's keep going.

lo_a2_bridge.say: Let us practice talking to a friend about it.

lo_a2_q1.say: You see your friend. How do you start the conversation?

lo_a2_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You see your friend. How do you start the conversation?

lo_a2_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Hey do you have a minute to talk. Let's keep going.

lo_a2_q2.say: Friend says sure. What do you say?

lo_a2_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Friend says sure. What do you say?

lo_a8_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I should say something instead of just sitting alone. Let's keep going.

fg_a1_bridge.say: Asking for forgiveness is not easy. Let us practice together.

fg_a1_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: When you hurt someone or did something wrong. Let's keep going.

fg_a1_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What makes a good apology?

fg_a1_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: A good apology is sincere and honest with no excuses. Let's keep going.

fg_a1_q4.say: What should you NOT say in an apology?

fg_a1_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What should you NOT say in an apology?

fg_a1_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: You should not say but or make excuses in an apology. Let's keep going.

fg_a1_q5.say: Are you ready to practice saying sorry?

fg_a1_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Are you ready to practice saying sorry?

fg_a1_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes I am ready to practice saying sorry. Let's keep going.

fg_a2_bridge.say: Let us start the apology conversation.

fg_a2_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You walk up to the person you hurt. What do you say first?

fg_a2_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Hey do you have a minute I need to say something important. Let's keep going.

fg_a2_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say okay. What is the first thing you say?

fg_a2_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am really sorry for what happened. Let's keep going.

fg_a2_q3.say: They look at you. What did you do wrong? Say it clearly.

fg_a2_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They look at you. What did you do wrong? Say it clearly.

fg_a2_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I said something that was hurtful and I should not have done that. Let's keep going.

fg_a2_q4.say: They listen. What do you say to show you understand their feelings?

fg_a2_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They listen. What do you say to show you understand their feelings?

fg_a2_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I understand that must have really hurt your feelings. Let's keep going.

fg_a2_q5.say: What do you promise going forward?

fg_a2_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What do you promise going forward?

fg_a2_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I promise I will be more careful and not do that again. Let's keep going.

fg_a3_q1.say: They say: Why did you do it?

fg_a3_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say: Why did you do it?

fg_a3_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I was not thinking clearly and I made a mistake. Let's keep going.

fg_a3_q2.say: They ask: Did you mean to hurt me?
fg_a3_q2.hint: Say it was not on purpose

fg_a3_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They ask: Did you mean to hurt me?
fg_a3_q2_r.hint: Say it was not on purpose

fg_a3_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: No I never meant to hurt you I am truly sorry. Let's keep going.

fg_a3_q3.say: They say: It still hurt. How do you respond?

fg_a3_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say: It still hurt. How do you respond?

fg_a3_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I know and you are right it should not have happened. Let's keep going.

fg_a3_q4.say: They ask: What will you do differently?

fg_a3_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They ask: What will you do differently?

fg_a3_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will think before I speak and consider how my words affect you. Let's keep going.

fg_a3_q5.say: You ask: Can you forgive me?

fg_a3_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You ask: Can you forgive me?

fg_a3_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Can you please forgive me I would really like to move forward. Let's keep going.

fg_a4_bridge.say: They need time to think about forgiving you.

fg_a4_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say: I need some time. How do you respond?

fg_a4_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Okay I completely understand take all the time you need. Let's keep going.

fg_a4_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You want to show you are genuine. What do you do?

fg_a4_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will give you space and not push you to decide. Let's keep going.

fg_a4_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes I absolutely meant every word I was genuine. Let's keep going.

fg_a4_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say they are thinking about it. How do you respond?

fg_a4_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you for considering it I am still here whenever you are ready. Let's keep going.

fg_a4_q5.say: They say: I accept your apology. What do you say?

fg_a4_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say: I accept your apology. What do you say?

fg_a4_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you so much that means everything to me. Let's keep going.

fg_a5_q1.say: They forgave you. How do you feel?

fg_a5_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They forgave you. How do you feel?

fg_a5_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I feel so relieved and grateful thank you. Let's keep going.

fg_a5_q2.say: How do you show you have changed?

fg_a5_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. How do you show you have changed?

fg_a5_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will show through my actions not just my words. Let's keep going.

fg_a5_q3.say: They want to move on. What do you say about the past?

fg_a5_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They want to move on. What do you say about the past?

fg_a5_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Let us leave it in the past and have a fresh start. Let's keep going.

fg_a5_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You want to do something kind for them. What could it be?

fg_a5_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I could write them a kind note or do something helpful for them. Let's keep going.

fg_a5_q5.say: What did you learn from this experience?

fg_a5_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What did you learn from this experience?

fg_a5_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I learned that words matter and I need to think before I speak. Let's keep going.

fg_a6_q1.say: You interrupted a friend in class and embarrassed them. How do you start the apology?

fg_a6_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You interrupted a friend in class and embarrassed them. How do you start the apology?

fg_a6_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am sorry about what happened in class when I interrupted you. Let's keep going.

fg_a6_q2.say: They say it was embarrassing. How do you acknowledge that?

fg_a6_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I know that must have been embarrassing and I am truly sorry. Let's keep going.

fg_a6_q3.say: They ask: Why did you do it?

fg_a6_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They ask: Why did you do it?

fg_a6_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I was not thinking and I just blurted it out which was wrong. Let's keep going.

fg_a6_q4.say: They say okay but not to do it again. What do you say?

fg_a6_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say okay but not to do it again. What do you say?

fg_a6_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I promise I will not do it again I have learned from this. Let's keep going.

fg_a6_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You ask: Are we okay?

fg_a6_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Are we okay I really value our friendship. Let's keep going.

fg_a7_bridge.say: What if the person does not forgive you right away?

fg_a7_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say they are not ready to forgive. How do you respond?

fg_a7_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I understand and I respect that please take all the time you need. Let's keep going.

fg_a7_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What can you do while you wait?

fg_a7_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I can be kind and patient and show I have changed through my actions. Let's keep going.

fg_a8_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Hey I need to talk to you about something important. Let's keep going.

fg_a8_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am sorry I made plans without including you that was wrong of me. Let's keep going.

fg_a8_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I completely understand that must have really hurt and I am so sorry. Let's keep going.

fg_a8_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You ask for forgiveness. What do you say?

fg_win.say: Wonderful! You gave a sincere apology and asked for forgiveness. That shows real maturity! You earned a star!

ff_a2_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They ask if you are okay. How do you answer honestly?

ff_a2_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I was hurt but I am getting better and I appreciate the apology. Let's keep going.

ff_a2_q5.say: They ask if you can forgive them. What do you say?

ff_a2_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They ask if you can forgive them. What do you say?

ff_a2_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes I forgive you and I am willing to move forward. Let's keep going.

ff_a3_bridge.say: What if you need more time?

ff_a3_q1.say: You are not ready to forgive right now. What do you say?

ff_a3_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You are not ready to forgive right now. What do you say?

ff_a3_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I need a little more time but I am working on it. Let's keep going.

ff_a3_q2.say: They say they understand. How do you respond?

ff_a3_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say they understand. How do you respond?

ff_a3_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you for understanding that means a lot to me. Let's keep going.

ff_a3_q3.say: They ask if you will talk again soon. What do you say?

ff_a3_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They ask if you will talk again soon. What do you say?

ff_a3_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes when I am ready I will reach out and talk again. Let's keep going.

ff_a3_q4.say: Later you feel ready. How do you approach them?

ff_a3_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Later you feel ready. How do you approach them?

ff_a3_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Hey I wanted to let you know I am ready to talk and I forgive you. Let's keep going.

ff_a3_q5.say: They say thank you. How do you close the conversation?

ff_a3_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say thank you. How do you close the conversation?

ff_a4_bridge.say: Let us talk about what forgiving looks like over time.

ff_a4_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. After forgiving do you have to be best friends again?

ff_a4_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: No you can forgive someone without going back to how things were. Let's keep going.

ff_a4_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: It happens slowly through consistent actions over time. Let's keep going.

ff_a4_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What if you feel angry again after forgiving?

ff_a4_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: It is normal sometimes to feel that way just remind yourself you chose to forgive. Let's keep going.

ff_a4_q4.say: What helps you actually let go of the hurt?

ff_a4_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What helps you actually let go of the hurt?

ff_a4_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Talking about it and focusing on moving forward helps me let go. Let's keep going.

ff_a4_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What would you tell a friend who is struggling to forgive?

ff_a4_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I would say take your time and do it when you feel ready I am here. Let's keep going.

ff_a5_bridge.say: Practicing what to say during forgiveness.

ff_a5_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. A friend says: I messed up and I am sorry. What do you say?

ff_a5_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you for telling me I hear you and I appreciate that. Let's keep going.

ff_a5_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They ask: Can we be okay again? What do you say?

ff_a5_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes I forgive you and I think we can be okay again. Let's keep going.

ff_a5_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You still feel a little hurt. How do you express that kindly?

ff_a5_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am still a little hurt but I am choosing to forgive you. Let's keep going.

ff_a5_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say they understand. What do you say next?

ff_a5_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am glad we talked let us move forward together. Let's keep going.

ff_a5_q5.say: How do you both seal the reconciliation?

ff_a5_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. How do you both seal the reconciliation?

ff_a5_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: All good let us start fresh and move on from here. Let's keep going.

ff_a6_bridge.say: Handling a repeated mistake after forgiving.

ff_a6_q1.say: They did the same thing again. How do you feel?

ff_a6_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They did the same thing again. How do you feel?

ff_a6_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I feel frustrated and hurt that it happened again. Let's keep going.

ff_a6_q2.say: What do you do before reacting?

ff_a6_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What do you do before reacting?

ff_a6_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I would pause and take a breath before saying anything. Let's keep going.

ff_a6_q3.say: You decide to talk to them again. What do you say?

ff_a6_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You decide to talk to them again. What do you say?

ff_a6_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I need to talk to you because this same thing has happened again. Let's keep going.

ff_a6_q4.say: They apologize again. Are you still willing to forgive?

ff_a6_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They apologize again. Are you still willing to forgive?

ff_a6_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: It is harder this time I need to see real change not just words. Let's keep going.

ff_a6_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What boundary do you set?

ff_a6_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: If this happens again I may need to step back from this friendship. Let's keep going.

ff_a7_q1.say: Your sibling borrowed something without asking. They apologize. What do you say first?

ff_a7_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Your sibling borrowed something without asking. They apologize. What do you say first?

ff_a7_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you for apologizing I appreciate that you came to me. Let's keep going.

ff_a7_q2.say: They say they should have asked. Do you agree?

ff_a7_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say they should have asked. Do you agree?

ff_a7_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes you should have asked first next time please do that. Let's keep going.

ff_a7_q3.say: They promise not to do it again. What do you say?

ff_a7_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They promise not to do it again. What do you say?

ff_a7_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Okay I trust that you mean it and I forgive you. Let's keep going.

ff_a7_q4.say: You want to make sure it does not happen again. What rule do you suggest?

ff_a7_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Let us agree you will always ask before borrowing anything of mine. Let's keep going.

ff_a7_q5.say: They agree. How do you close the conversation?

ff_a7_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They agree. How do you close the conversation?

ff_a7_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Good I am glad we sorted that out all good between us. Let's keep going.

ff_a8_bridge.say: Final full practice: forgiving a classmate.

ff_a8_q1.say: A classmate said something unkind about you. They apologize. What do you do first?

ff_a8_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. A classmate said something unkind about you. They apologize. What do you do first?

ff_a8_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I would listen calmly and let them finish apologizing. Let's keep going.

ff_a8_q2.say: They say they are very sorry. What do you say?

ff_a8_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say they are very sorry. What do you say?

ff_a8_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you I appreciate you saying that to me. Let's keep going.

ff_a8_q3.say: You tell them how it made you feel. What do you say?

ff_a8_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You tell them how it made you feel. What do you say?

ff_a8_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: What you said really hurt my feelings and made me feel embarrassed. Let's keep going.

ff_a8_q4.say: They understand and ask if you can forgive them. What do you say?

ff_a8_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They understand and ask if you can forgive them. What do you say?

ff_a8_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes I forgive you I do not want this between us. Let's keep going.

ff_a8_q5.say: How do you close the conversation and move on?

ff_a8_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. How do you close the conversation and move on?

ff_a8_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: All good let us move forward and put this behind us. Let's keep going.

ff_win.say: Excellent! You showed real maturity by accepting an apology and moving forward. You earned a star!

tn_a1_bridge.say: Trying something new can feel scary. Let us talk about it.

tn_a1_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I feel nervous but also a little excited when I try something new. Let's keep going.

tn_a1_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Is it okay to feel nervous?

tn_a1_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes it is completely normal and everyone feels that way sometimes. Let's keep going.

tn_a2_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: That is good to hear thank you it helps me feel better. Let's keep going.

tn_a2_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say: And what is the best that could happen?

tn_a2_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I could love it and be good at it and maybe make new friends. Let's keep going.

tn_a3_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I would sign up or show up and see what it is about. Let's keep going.

tn_a3_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I tell myself I can do this and it is okay to just try my best. Let's keep going.

tn_a4_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Would you try it again?

tn_a4_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I would say just go it is not as bad as you think and you might love it. Let's keep going.

tn_a5_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I worry I am not good enough and I do not know anyone on the team. Let's keep going.

tn_a5_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: That is true and a good point I had not thought of it that way. Let's keep going.

dr_a1_bridge.say: Let us practice going to the doctor.

dr_a3_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I also have a headache and I feel really tired and achy. Let's keep going.

dr_a5_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes I think I understand but could you explain a little more. Let's keep going.

dr_a5_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Okay twice a day for seven days I understand. Let's keep going.

dr_a5_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Because stopping early might leave some bacteria behind and they could come back stronger. Let's keep going.

mu_a1_bridge.say: Let us practice clearing up a misunderstanding.

mu_a1_q1.hint: Say: when someone gets the wrong idea

mu_a1_q1_r.hint: Say: when someone gets the wrong idea

mu_a1_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: A misunderstanding is when someone gets the wrong idea about what you said or did. Let's keep going.

mu_a1_q2.say: How should you feel when someone misunderstands you?

mu_a1_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. How should you feel when someone misunderstands you?

mu_a1_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: It is normal to feel frustrated but the best thing is to stay calm and explain clearly. Let's keep going.

mu_a1_q3.say: What is the first thing to do when you realise there is a misunderstanding?

mu_a1_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What is the first thing to do when you realise there is a misunderstanding?

mu_a1_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I should stay calm take a breath and then calmly explain what I actually meant. Let's keep going.

mu_a1_q4.say: Why is it important not to get defensive?

mu_a1_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Why is it important not to get defensive?

mu_a1_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Getting defensive usually makes things worse it is better to explain calmly and listen. Let's keep going.

mu_a1_q5.say: Ready to practice clearing up a misunderstanding?

mu_a1_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ready to practice clearing up a misunderstanding?

mu_a1_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes I am ready to practice clearing up a misunderstanding. Let's keep going.

mu_a2_q1.say: A friend thinks you said something mean. How do you approach them?

mu_a2_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. A friend thinks you said something mean. How do you approach them?

mu_a2_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Hey can we talk for a second I think there might have been a misunderstanding. Let's keep going.

mu_a2_q2.say: They seem upset. What do you say first?

mu_a2_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They seem upset. What do you say first?

mu_a2_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I can see you are upset and I want you to know that was not what I meant at all. Let's keep going.

mu_a2_q3.say: They say you were rude. What do you say?
expectedKeywords: did not mean it that way

mu_a2_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say you were rude. What do you say?
expectedKeywords: did not mean it that way

mu_a2_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am sorry it came across that way that was genuinely not my intention let me explain. Let's keep going.

mu_a2_q4.say: They agree to listen. How do you explain?

mu_a2_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They agree to listen. How do you explain?

mu_a2_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: What I actually meant was that I was joking I was not trying to be hurtful at all. Let's keep going.

mu_a2_q5.say: They look like they understand a bit more. What do you say?

mu_a2_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They look like they understand a bit more. What do you say?

mu_a2_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Does that make more sense I hope that clears things up I genuinely did not mean any harm. Let's keep going.

mu_a3_q1.say: They explain how it felt from their perspective. What do you do?

mu_a3_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They explain how it felt from their perspective. What do you do?

mu_a3_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I would listen carefully and let them finish without interrupting to understand their side fully. Let's keep going.

mu_a3_q2.say: They say it felt like you were dismissing them. What do you say?

mu_a3_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say it felt like you were dismissing them. What do you say?

mu_a3_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I completely understand why it felt that way and I am sorry it came across like that. Let's keep going.

mu_a3_q3.say: They ask why you said what you said. What do you say?

mu_a3_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They ask why you said what you said. What do you say?

mu_a3_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: At the time I thought it was clear what I meant but I can see now why it was confusing. Let's keep going.

mu_a3_q4.say: They say they just wanted to feel heard. What do you say?

mu_a3_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say they just wanted to feel heard. What do you say?

mu_a3_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: You are absolutely heard and your feelings are completely valid I hear you. Let's keep going.

mu_a3_q5.say: How do you both move toward resolution?

mu_a3_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. How do you both move toward resolution?

mu_a3_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am glad we talked this out I think we both understand each other better now. Let's keep going.

mu_a4_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I want to apologise even though I did not mean it the way it came across I am sorry it hurt you. Let's keep going.

mu_a4_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you for accepting that it means a lot to me and I really appreciate your understanding. Let's keep going.

mu_a4_q3.say: You want to make sure it does not happen again. What do you say?

mu_a4_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You want to make sure it does not happen again. What do you say?

mu_a4_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: In future I will be more careful about how I phrase things to avoid confusion like this. Let's keep going.

mu_a4_q4.say: They say they will also ask for clarification next time. What do you say?

mu_a4_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say they will also ask for clarification next time. What do you say?

mu_a4_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: That is great I am glad we both want to handle it better next time it really is a team effort. Let's keep going.

mu_a4_q5.say: How do you close the conversation?

mu_a4_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. How do you close the conversation?

mu_a4_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am so glad we cleared that up all good between us let us move forward with a fresh start. Let's keep going.
