cg_win.say: Wonderful! You gave a warm and genuine congratulation that made someone feel truly celebrated! You earned a star!

ty_a1_bridge.say: Let us practice saying a truly meaningful thank you.

ty_a1_q1.say: What is the difference between a quick thank you and a meaningful one?
ty_a1_q1.hint: Say a meaningful one is specific and sincere

ty_a1_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What is the difference between a quick thank you and a meaningful one?
ty_a1_q1_r.hint: Say a meaningful one is specific and sincere

ty_a1_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: A meaningful thank you is specific and sincere it tells the person exactly what you are grateful for and why it mattered. Let's keep going.

ty_a1_q2.say: Why does it matter to say thank you sincerely?
ty_a1_q2.hint: Say it makes people feel valued

ty_a1_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Why does it matter to say thank you sincerely?
ty_a1_q2_r.hint: Say it makes people feel valued

ty_a1_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Saying it sincerely makes the other person feel truly valued and appreciated which strengthens the relationship. Let's keep going.

ty_a1_q3.say: What could you include in a meaningful thank you?

ty_a1_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What could you include in a meaningful thank you?

ty_a1_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I could mention exactly what they did how it helped me and how it made me feel. Let's keep going.

ty_a1_q4.say: When is a good time to say thank you?

ty_a1_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. When is a good time to say thank you?

ty_a1_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Right after is great but an unexpected heartfelt thank you anytime can be even more meaningful. Let's keep going.

ty_a1_q5.say: Ready to practice saying a meaningful thank you?

ty_a1_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ready to practice saying a meaningful thank you?

ty_a1_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Yes I am ready to practice saying a truly meaningful thank you. Let's keep going.

ty_a2_bridge.say: Saying thank you to a friend.

ty_a2_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Your friend helped you through a hard time. What do you say?

ty_a2_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I just want to say a genuine thank you for being there for me I truly do not know what I would have done without you. Let's keep going.

ty_a2_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say it was nothing. What do you say?

ty_a2_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: It was actually everything to me please know that your support made such a huge difference I really mean that. Let's keep going.

ty_a2_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You want to name specifically what they did. What do you say?

ty_a2_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Specifically when you stayed with me and just listened without judging that was exactly what I needed that day. Let's keep going.

ty_a2_q4_r.hint: Offer to be there for them

ty_a2_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I hope you know I am always here for you too and I would do the same in a heartbeat you mean a lot to me. Let's keep going.

ty_a2_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say your thank you means a lot. What do you say?

ty_a2_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am glad and I meant every word I never want you to feel taken for granted you are a wonderful friend. Let's keep going.

ty_a3_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I just wanted to say a genuine thank you for going out of your way to help me it really made a difference. Let's keep going.

ty_a3_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: When you stayed after class to explain it again that extra time made everything click for me I am so grateful. Let's keep going.

ty_a3_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say they are glad it helped. What do you say?

ty_a4_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You want to write a thank you note. What do you include first?

ty_a4_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I would start by addressing them by name for example dear Alex or dear Mrs Smith to make it personal. Let's keep going.

ty_a4_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. What do you write in the body of the note?

ty_a4_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I would write specifically what they did how it helped me and how it made me feel to make it genuine and meaningful. Let's keep going.

ty_a4_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. How do you close the note?

ty_a4_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You give them the note. How do they react?
